covers: agent-readiness derivation (dec-spor-agent-readiness-derived-classification): agent via readiness:agent stamp (readiness_by provenance) and via assigned→agent edge; human via requires:human, via a question item, and via an open 1-hop neighborhood question; human WINS over a co-present agent stamp (task-override); untriaged rides no readiness fields (byte-identical shape); readiness + readiness_reasons on each decisive item, the leading why-line clause, and the counts_by_readiness envelope aggregate
